title: Automatic reference architecture conformance checking for SOA - Based software systems
authors: Weinreich, Rainer and Buchgeher, Georg
rule_description: Constraints on roles and role relationships in a company-wide RA.
rq1_evidence: "Reference architectures are defined based on rules consisting of roles and of constraints on roles and role relationships." (p. 95)
rq2_evidence: "The whole process of architecture conformance checking including the extraction of an architecture model from an existing software system... can be performed automatically in our approach." (p. 103)
rq3_evidence: "The result of the checking process (i.e., the rule violations) can be visualized in architecture diagrams." (p. 99)
extractor_notes: Foca na linguagem LISA e domínio bancário.

title: Ensuring and assessing architecture conformance to microservice decomposition patterns
authors: Zdun, Uwe and Navarro, Elena M. and Leymann, Frank
rule_description: Pattern conformance: independently deployable components and avoidance of shared dependencies.
rq1_evidence:
"Based on existing microservice patterns
 we have hypothesized a number of constraints and metrics to make an automated judgment on microservice architecture decomposition." (p. 412)
rq2_evidence: "We can claim that our approach can easily be mapped using an automated mapping from the source code to an architecture model, assuming standard component model abstractions, such as those in UML2" (p. 427)
rq3_evidence: "Based on existing microservice patterns we have hypothesized a number of constraints and metrics to make an automated judgment" (p. 412)

title: Evaluation of microservice architectures: A metric and tool-based approach
authors: Thomas Engel; Melanie Langermeier; Bernhard Bauer; and Alexander Hofmann
venue: International Conference on Advanced Information Systems Engineering (CAiSE)
rule_description: Adherence to 10 principles (small size, loose coupling, DDD, etc.).

rq2_evidence: "The required architecture data is captured with a reverse engineering approach from traces of communication data." (p. 74)
rq3_evidence: "Using the Goal Question Metric approach we derived automatic executable metrics to evaluate the recovered dependency model." (p. 88)
extractor_notes: Foco em análise dinâmica de logs.
